spec_match.rationale: The page now probes the Window surface and launches a real Dedicated Worker that checks FontFaceSet, FontFace, FontFaceSet construction, and OffscreenCanvas text metrics where available.

interactive.rationale: Pattern toggles, live font loading, and the Worker demo all execute real API code and stream visible results into the page.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the migration framing and helpfully illustrates the before/after transition.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully falls back to the legacy pattern if the FontFaceSet constructor is not supported, ensuring the demo remains functional.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus entry and a CSS Font Loading FontFaceSet spec link.

design_system.rationale: Visually distinct before/after panels and clear layout aligned with the design system.

summary: Major finding resolved: the worker use case now runs in a real Dedicated Worker, reports actual FontFaceSet and OffscreenCanvas availability, and keeps graceful fallback messages for unsupported worker surfaces.
